import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    PYRAMID = 5
    SQUARE = 4
    YELLOW = 5
    GREEN = 2

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    def find_object(grid, tile_id, color_id):
        mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == tile_id) & (grid[:, :, 1] == color_id)
        count = jnp.sum(mask).astype(jnp.float32)
        y = jnp.sum(yy * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        x = jnp.sum(xx * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        return y, x, count

    # Current state
    pyr_y_s, pyr_x_s, pyr_cnt_s = find_object(state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_s, sq_x_s, _ = find_object(state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    ay_s = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_s = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_s = (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    # Next state
    pyr_y_n, pyr_x_n, pyr_cnt_n = find_object(next_state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_n, sq_x_n, _ = find_object(next_state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    ay_n = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_n = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_n = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    hs = holding_s.astype(jnp.float32)
    hn = holding_n.astype(jnp.float32)

    just_picked = (~holding_s) & holding_n
    just_placed = holding_s & (~holding_n)

    pyr_on_grid_n = pyr_cnt_n > 0.5

    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)

    # ===== SUCCESS CONDITION =====
    dist_pyr_sq_n = jnp.abs(pyr_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_n - sq_x_n)
    success = pyr_on_grid_n & (~holding_n) & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)

    # ===== POTENTIAL FUNCTION =====
    # Phase 1: not holding → minimize dist(agent, pyramid)
    # Phase 2: holding → minimize dist(agent, square)

    dist_agent_pyr_s = jnp.abs(ay_s - pyr_y_s) + jnp.abs(ax_s - pyr_x_s)
    dist_agent_pyr_n = jnp.abs(ay_n - pyr_y_n) + jnp.abs(ax_n - pyr_x_n)
    dist_agent_sq_s = jnp.abs(ay_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(ax_s - sq_x_s)
    dist_agent_sq_n = jnp.abs(ay_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(ax_n - sq_x_n)

    # Potential at current state
    # If not holding: negative distance to pyramid
    # If holding: negative distance to square (shifted by max_dist to stay positive)
    potential_s = jax.lax.select(
        holding_s,
        max_dist - dist_agent_sq_s,
        max_dist - dist_agent_pyr_s
    )

    # Potential at next state
    # Special case: if just picked up, the potential jumps from phase1 to phase2
    # If just placed, potential depends on how close pyramid is to square
    potential_n_not_holding = max_dist - dist_agent_pyr_n
    potential_n_holding = max_dist - dist_agent_sq_n

    potential_n = jax.lax.select(
        holding_n,
        potential_n_holding,
        potential_n_not_holding
    )

    # Potential-based shaping reward
    gamma = 0.99
    r_shaping = gamma * potential_n - potential_s

    # ===== MILESTONE BONUSES =====
    # Pickup bonus: large reward for picking up the pyramid
    r_pickup = just_picked.astype(jnp.float32) * 5.0

    # Putdown reward: based on placement quality
    dist_pyr_sq_n_safe = jnp.where(pyr_on_grid_n, dist_pyr_sq_n, max_dist)
    r_putdown_adj = (just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n_safe >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n_safe <= 1.5)).astype(jnp.float32) * 10.0
    r_putdown_near = (just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n_safe > 1.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n_safe <= 3.5)).astype(jnp.float32) * 1.0
    r_putdown_far = (just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n_safe > 3.5)).astype(jnp.float32) * (-2.0)

    # Success bonus
    r_success = success.astype(jnp.float32) * 20.0

    total = (
        r_shaping
        + r_pickup
        + r_putdown_adj
        + r_putdown_near
        + r_putdown_far
        + r_success
    )

    return total.astype(jnp.float32)
